metadata.rationale: 文本抓住了两点真实基础：伊维菌素确属人用药，且美国网络上确有相关讨论与个人表态；但样本把实验室药理线索、个人观点帖文与特定汉坦病毒事件过度串联，并通过编辑后的截图强化这种现实关联，导致受众更容易把“被讨论”理解成“接近可用”。

prediction.predicted_label: verdict=False | taxonomy=T1 Fabrication; V1 Synthetic Visual Content; C2 Contextual Inconsistency

best_trajectory.thought: Search Wikipedia for general medical information regarding Ivermectin and its approved uses versus viral infections like Hantavirus.
best_trajectory.observation: Ivermectin is an antiparasitic medication. After its discovery in 1975, its first uses were in veterinary medicine to prevent and treat heartworm and acariasis. Approved for human use in 1987, it is used to treat infestations including head lice, scabies, river blindness (onchocerciasis), strongyloidiasis, trichuriasis, ascariasis and lymphatic filariasis. It works through many mechanisms to kill the targeted parasites, and can be taken by mouth, or applied to the skin for external infestations. It belongs to the avermectin family of medications.

best_trajectory.thought: The text states there are no reliable clinical studies proving Ivermectin helps with Hantavirus and standard treatment is supportive care. I should search Google for general search results regarding Ivermectin's effectiveness against Hantavirus to verify if there are any studies or conflicting reports that might refute the text or reinforce the warning.
